---
title: "CHE 318 Lecture 33"
subtitle: "Final Exam Review Lecture (I)"
author: "Dr. Tian Tian"
date: "2026-03-30"
format:
  html: {}
  revealjs:
    output-file: slides.html
  pdf:
    output-file: L33.pdf
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html" unless-format="revealjs"}

::: {.callout-note}
- Slides 👉  [Open presentation🗒️](./slides.html)
- PDF version of course note  👉 [Open in pdf](./L33.pdf)
:::

:::


## Learning outcome {.center}

This is a review lecture for preparing for the final exam, focusing on
the concept sheets from pre-midterm.

## Cheatsheet for pre-midterm mass transfer

![Charts distributed in class. [PDF Version](./public/cheatsheet-premidterm.pdf)](./public/cheatsheet-premidterm.svg)

## Cheatsheet for convective mass transfer & coefficients

![Charts distributed in class. [PDF Version](./public/cheatsheet-coeff.svg)](./public/cheatsheet-coeff.svg)
